positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala-style design featuring interconnected celestial flora and geometric patterns. The central motif showcases bioluminescent glowing mushrooms and crystalline starbursts emerging from stylized mandalas. Color palette is dominated by deep midnight blue, iridescent purple, electric teal, and accented with glowing neon gold outlines. Strong contrast, clean silhouette, elegant line art mixed with digital watercolor textures. Central composition suitable for apparel printing. Mystical, cosmic, psychedelic, vaporwave aesthetic, high resolution, vector illustration style.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, low quality, grain, smudge, text, logo, watermark, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, photographic, realistic, messy, grit, grunge
